attributes.Sql Query:
/***  INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG = 'I'   PURE NET CHANGES   ***/ 
 
 SELECT 
 NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
 NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NBM.PRODUCT_KEY,
 NBM.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NBM.AR_TRX_KEY,
 NBM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
 NBM.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
 NBM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 NBM.SALES_REP_NUMBER AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
 NBM.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
 NBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
 NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
 NBM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
 NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NBM.CANCELLED_FLG,
 NBM.CANCEL_CODE,
 NBM.ACQUISITION_FLG,
 NBM.FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG,
 NBM.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG,
 NBM.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
 NBM.OVERLAY_FLG,
 NBM.IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 NBM.CHARGES_FLG,
 NBM.SALESREP_FLG,
 NBM.MISC_FLG,
 NBM.SERVICE_FLG,
 NBM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 NBM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 NBM.REVENUE_FLG,
 NBM.RMA_FLG,                
 NBM.TRADE_IN_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,
 NBM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,
 NBM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
 NBM.WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
 NBM.CONVERSION_RT,
 NBM.CONVERSION_DT,
 NBM.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
 NBM.DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM,
 NBM.DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
 NBM.DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD,
 NBM.DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE,
 NBM.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,
 NBM.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
 NBM.BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT,
 NBM.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
 NBM.DV_DEAL_ID,
 NBM.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
 NBM.DV_BOOKED_DT,
 NBM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
 NBM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
 'I' AS INSERT_UPDATE_FLAG,
 REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY ,
 NBM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD   ,  
 NBM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,
 NBM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT ,
 NBM.DV_FMV_FLG,
 NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,    
 NBM.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM ,      
 NBM.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION    ,          
 NBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG    ,             
 NBM.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT  ,        
 NBM.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT   ,
 NBM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY        
 /*ADDED BELOW ATTRIBUTES AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16 BY */ 
 ,NBM.DSV_FLG
 ,NBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   /* OA-Q1FY16 */     
 ,NBM.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT /* ADDED AS PART OF sep 27TH CD RELEASE */
 ,NBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
 ,NBM.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY /*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/  
,NBM.TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY
 ,NBM.DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT
 ,NBM.DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT
 ,NBM.DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT /*BGM Q1FY17 Changes*/  
 /*ADDED THE BELOW 4 COLUMNS AS PART OF RO PROJECT RELEASE: Q3FY17 */
 ,NBM.XCAT_FLG
 ,NBM.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,NBM.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
 ,NBM.ELA_FLG
 ,NBM.DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,NBM.LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
 ,NBM.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT    
 /*,NBM.DV_TOTAL_CNTRCT_VAL_USD_AMT   */
 ,NBM.DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT
 ,NBM.DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT 
 ,NBM.DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,NBM.DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
 ,NBM.DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT
,NBM.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD  /*  added as part of June29th2017 */ 
,NBM.DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /* Q1FY18 PA */
,NBM.DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT /*added as part product BGM - Q1FY18 release */
 ,NBM.POB_TYPE_CD
,NBM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
NBM.SALES_MOTION_CD,
NBM.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,
NBM.DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
NBM.DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
NBM.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY ,/* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */

/*Added as part of EDW_FY19 Nov08Rel CR11701*/
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DT,
DV_ENRICHED_CONTRACT_DURATION,
DV_ENRICHMENT_RULE_DESC,
/* added as part of 10th March release*/
NBM.ENRICHED_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NBM.DV_ENRICHED_UNK_END_CUST_RULE_DESC,
NBM.ACCRUED_REV_TRX_KEY,   /* added as part of Revenue Accruals  */
NBM.MERAKI_REV_TRX_KEY   /* added as part of MERAKI  */
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD
,NBM.ACQUISITION_ROLE
,NBM.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
,NBM.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE
,NBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_LIST_PRICE
,NBM.DD_COMP_US_ORIG_EXT_LIST_PRICE
,NBM.DV_INV_DTM           
,NBM.DV_COMPENSATION_DTM 
,NBM.SALES_COMPENSATION_POLICY_CODE /*Renamed as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
,NBM.SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,NBM.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
/*ADDED AS PART OF SFP Q4FY21 REL*/
,NBM.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_BKG_AMOUNT
,NBM.DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY /*ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY22 EA Vnext */
,NBM.DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG /*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
,NBM.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,NBM.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,NBM.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,NBM.DV_FOR_PRTNR_NEW_CUST_FLG
,NBM.MANAGED_SERVICE_FLG
,NBM.MANAGED_SERVICE_SRC_CODE
,NBM.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
,NBM.TOTAL_NETPC_WTHOUT_CR_USD_AMT
,NBM.FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,NBM.MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,NBM.NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,NBM.LINKED_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,NBM.MNTLY_SUBSCR_CHRG_UPLIFT_US_AMT
,NBM.SK_ACQ_OPTY_LINE_ID
FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKGS_MEASURE  NBM
 WHERE NBM.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  > '$$LastExtractDate'
 
 /*
 AND NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = (SELECT BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE FROM  $$STGDB.WI_RSTD_BKGS_MAX_PROCESS_DATE )
  */
